visual_description: A person stands in silhouette against a dramatic sky at either sunrise or sunset. The sun is low on the horizon, casting a bright glow behind the figure and illuminating the clouds. The person is initially seen in profile, then slowly turns to face the camera, their back now to the viewer.
audio_description: A single, sustained, high-pitched, and ethereal vocal note is heard, creating a solemn and atmospheric mood.
